items.caption: A collection of six colored bottle caps arranged on a white surface, with a clear glass bottle in the background. each cap is labeled with a color and a corresponding acid, indicating a visual representation of the concept that the color of the bottle cap has a meaning. the labels are as follows: red: nitric acid, blue: hydrochloric acid, yellow: sulfuric acid, brown: acetic acid, white: phosphoric acid, and green: ammonium hydroxide. the text at the top of the image states, "the color of the bottle cap has a meaning." likely educational, aiming to illustrate the concept of color-coding in chemical storage or handling.
